item.title: Trump unveils maritime action plan as China dominates global shipbuilding
item.description: Trump administration unveils plan to reclaim U.S. maritime dominance as China controls global ship production and 99% of trade moves on foreign ships.

item.title: DNC Chair Ken Martin boasts ‘win after win,’ shrugs off massive Trump, Republican money lead
item.description: Democrats tout "positive momentum" with recent victories as they eye midterm elections, hoping to replicate their 2018 success in winning back Congres...

item.title: Transit funding hits record highs as ridership languishes, new report questions return on billions
item.description: Federal transit spending hits record highs while bus and rail usage continues to lag behind pre-pandemic levels, sparking debate over policy effective...

item.title: Rubio seals civil nuclear cooperation agreement with Hungary
item.description: Secretary of State Marco Rubio inked a nuclear cooperation agreement involving the U.S. and Hungary, hailing the countries' close relationship.

item.title: Nancy Mace proposes bill to make aliens deportable, inadmissible for animal cruelty
item.description: Republican Rep. Nancy Mace of South Carolina fields a measure to declare aliens who are convicted of animal abuse as deportable and inadmissible.
